worldData.instructions:
HELIOS — a story in chapters. One world.

MOVE — the light follows your cursor · CLICK & HOLD — hurry time / turn the light
Bottom corners — move between UNLOCKED chapters.

CHAPTER I — THE VALLEY: carry the sun; hold for the moon. Light the six stones to wake the tree. When the moon is full, its reflection on the lake invites you down.
CHAPTER II — THE DROWNED MOON: six phase-stones ring the deep; match the crescents. The moon-tree grows — step through it.
CHAPTER III — THE BEARER: seven stars wait. DRAG a thread of light from star to star — six threads write the light-carrier into the sky, then step through its door.
CHAPTER IV — THE FIRST LIGHT: the void before any sun. Cup the faint spark and HOLD to feed it; keep still, or the dark eats its edges. Kindle it whole and it ignites into the first light.

Progress persists per chapter.

stepHooks.author: fable
stepHooks.description: HELIOS: the whole story — CH I the valley (held sun), CH II the drowned moon (phase ring), CH III the Bearer (draw the constellation). Corner doors move between unlocked chapters.
